name: analyzer
description: Stage 2 of the security-audit Power. Reads .forge/scan-raw.json, deduplicates overlapping findings, scores severity, and writes .forge/scan-analyzed.json. No source access — only the raw findings.
verdictFormat:
VERDICT: PASS | FAIL | NEEDS_INFO
FINDINGS: <count>
SEVERITY: <none|low|medium|high|critical>
notes: THE TIGHTEST allowedTools in the entire pattern. The analyzer literally cannot read source code — only the raw findings file. This is on purpose: deduplication is purely a data operation, not a code review.
